creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Geoffroy,

thanks for submitting this update.
I have tested it and it builds fine on 7.4 and 8.2, both on i386 and amd64.
However, for 9.0 it fails during the link as shown on the following
tinderbox log:

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/9.0-FreeBSD/mariadb-server-5.2.7.log

Would it be possible for you to look at this link problem please?

Thanks for your help!
culot@
